history.content:
Summary: The owner directive for Vincent/site_architect_v1’s News Channel architecture tasks was enforced in team_mmgrtjos_6f1bab’s logic.

Changes: The team’s manager now treats any Vincent response that is merely “Done!” or otherwise lacks the required detail as a failed run, and it only marks runs as successful when the final output includes at minimum (1) a clear Summary of what changed, (2) a detailed Changes section describing exactly what was modified, and (3) any additional News Channel–specific required details.

Result: Future runs must include the mandated final output structure for completion.
